footer.description: Strategic business development for Nordic companies and leadership teams. From insight and strategy to measurable results.

home.heroDesc: We help Nordic companies and leadership teams navigate complexity, accelerate growth and build organisations ready for the future.
home.aboutP1: Blomsnes Development was founded by Janicke Blomsnes with a conviction: that strategic advisory should lead to real change. We combine analytical depth with operational sharpness and always work close to leadership — from diagnosis to delivery.
home.aboutP2: Our approach is rooted in the Nordic leadership tradition: transparency, trust and determination.
home.cap1Desc: We identify the critical choices and build strategies that transform entire organisations — not just individual functions.
home.cap2Desc: We lead your organisation through the digital shift with focus on business value, change management and measurable returns.
home.cap3Desc: We strengthen leaders and management teams to make better decisions, mobilise organisations and deliver results under pressure.
home.methDesc: Our process is designed to eliminate the gap between strategy and reality. Each phase has clear deliverables, ownership and metrics.
home.meth1Text: In-depth analysis of business, market and organisation. We map the strategic reality — not the assumptions.
home.meth2Text: Tailored strategic frameworks with clear priorities, measurable goals and a concrete action plan.
home.meth3Text: Implementation support ensuring the strategy lives in the organisation. We stay until results are delivered.
home.meth4Text: Continuous measurement, optimisation and knowledge transfer. Sustainable growth — not temporary effects.
home.ctaTitle: Every transformation begins with a conversation
home.ctaDesc: We invite you to an open conversation about your business, your challenges and your ambitions. No obligations — just an honest exchange between senior advisors and decision-makers.

about.label: About us
about.name: Janicke Blomsnes
about.p1: I am the founder of Blomsnes Development and work as a strategic business developer and advisor. With many years of experience helping companies through change and growth, I have developed a deep understanding of what it takes to navigate a complex business world.
about.p2: My driving force is to see ambitious companies and leaders reach their full potential. The best results emerge when insight meets determination.
about.storyTitle: A journey driven by passion for results
about.storyP1: During my years in business development and leadership, I have had the privilege of working with everything from fast-growing startups to established organisations. What unites all successful transformation journeys I have been part of is one thing: the courage to act on insight.
about.storyP2: I founded Blomsnes Development to offer what I am most passionate about — helping companies go from thought to action, and from strategy to results. My methodology is built on combining analytical acuity with a genuine focus on people.
about.storyP3: In every engagement, I strive not only to deliver strategic recommendations, but to stand by your side throughout the implementation. For me, it is the results that count — not the presentations.
about.val1Desc: Every successful strategy begins with deep understanding. We invest time in truly understanding your business before taking a single step.
about.val2Desc: We are passionate about seeing organisations grow. Your result is our result — and we never give up until we get there.
about.val3Desc: We believe in long-term relationships. Instead of delivering a report and moving on, we work side by side with you throughout the journey.
about.val4Desc: Strategies without results are just documents. Everything we do aims at measurable change that makes a real difference.
about.ctaTitle: Let us talk about your ambitions
about.ctaDesc: I always take the time to listen. Book a call and let us explore together how I can contribute to your success.

services.label: Services
services.desc: Every business is unique. We offer a broad spectrum of services tailored to your specific needs — always focused on real, measurable value.
services.s1Desc: We help you identify growth opportunities, build sustainable strategies and execute them with clear results. Through in-depth analyses of your market, competitors and organisation, we create a strategy unique to your business.
services.s2Desc: Digital transformation is not just about technology — it is about changing how your organisation creates value. We guide you through the entire journey with focus on technology serving the business.
services.s3Desc: Many companies have strategies — few succeed in turning them into real results. Our proven methodology takes you from strategic thinking to concrete action and measurable success.
services.s4Desc: Personal coaching for business leaders and entrepreneurs who want to develop their leadership, make better decisions and navigate complex challenges with greater confidence.
services.s5Desc: A strong organisation is the foundation for sustainable growth. We help you build an organisation ready to meet the challenges of the future — with the right structure, culture and competence.
services.s6Desc: Inspiring and hands-on workshops that give your team concrete tools. Tailored to your needs and context.
services.ctaTitle: Which service is right for you?
services.ctaDesc: Not sure where to start? Book a free consultation and we will help you identify the right next step.

coaching.label: Coaching
coaching.desc: Personal coaching for those who want to grow as a leader, make better decisions and create results with greater ease.
coaching.a1Desc: Develop the ability to see the big picture, identify patterns and make decisions that create long-term value.
coaching.a2Desc: Build the confidence to make difficult decisions in complex situations — with clarity, courage and reflection.
coaching.a3Desc: Rediscover the driving force and create sustainable routines that give energy instead of draining it.
coaching.a4Desc: Clarify the vision, define the goals and create a concrete plan to reach them with precision.
coaching.fw1: CEOs and business leaders who want to take their leadership to the next level
coaching.fw4: Leaders who want to develop their ability to inspire and engage
coaching.fw5: Founders who need a sparring partner outside their own organisation
coaching.p1Desc: We start with a free call to understand your situation and your goals.
coaching.p2Desc: We design a coaching programme tailored to your specific needs.
coaching.p3Desc: We meet regularly — digitally or in person — for focused sessions.
coaching.p4Desc: Between sessions, we are available for questions and quick check-ins.
coaching.ctaDesc: The first step is always the most important. Book a free call and let us explore what coaching can do for you.

strategy.label: Methodology
strategy.desc: Our proven methodology takes you from current state to desired state — step by step, with clear goals and measurable results.
strategy.p1Desc: We start by understanding your business in depth. Through interviews, data analysis and market research, we map your current situation, your strengths and the opportunities that exist.
strategy.p2Desc: With insights as the foundation, we build a strategy that is specific, measurable and achievable. We define clear goals, prioritise efforts and create an action plan with concrete milestones.
strategy.p3Desc: Now we turn strategy into action. We work closely with you and your team to ensure every initiative is executed with quality.
strategy.p4Desc: We continuously measure against set goals. Through regular analysis, we identify what works and what new opportunities arise.
strategy.p4d4: Plan for the next phase of growth
strategy.ctaTitle: Ready to go from strategy to results?
strategy.ctaDesc: Every journey begins with a first step. Book a free call and let us discuss how this methodology can be adapted for your business.

blog.label: Blog
blog.title: Insights & reflections
blog.desc: Thoughts on business development, leadership, change and growth.
blog.ctaDesc: Have thoughts about something you have read, or want to talk about how it can be applied in your business?
blog.featuredTitle: Five signs your strategy is not living in the organisation
blog.featuredExcerpt: Many companies have ambitious strategy documents that are never put into action. Here are five common signs — and what you can do about it.
blog.post1Title: The quiet power of leadership: listening before you lead
blog.post1Excerpt: The best leaders are not those who talk the most — but those who listen the deepest.
blog.post2Title: Digital transformation: it is not about the technology
blog.post2Excerpt: Companies that succeed understand that technology is just a tool. The real change happens in culture and mindset.
blog.post3Title: From uncertainty to decisiveness: a coaching journey
blog.post3Excerpt: How a CEO went from postponing difficult decisions to making them with confidence — and what it meant.
blog.post4Excerpt: We measure everything. But are we measuring the right things? A discussion on how the right metrics drive growth.
blog.post5Excerpt: Three critical factors that separate success from failure in organisational change.

cases.label: Cases
cases.desc: Every engagement is unique, but the goal is always the same — real, measurable results that make a difference.
cases.c1Title: Growth strategy for a service company in transition
cases.c1Challenge: A mid-sized service company faced stagnating growth and increasing competition. The existing business model had reached its limits.
cases.c1Approach: Through in-depth market and competitive analysis, we identified new growth opportunities and designed a differentiated positioning strategy.
cases.c1r1: New strategic direction anchored across the organisation
cases.c1r2: Three new high-potential growth areas identified
cases.c2Title: Digital maturity in a traditional industry
cases.c2Challenge: An organisation needed to modernise processes and customer experiences to meet changing demands and new competition from digital players.
cases.c2Approach: We conducted a digital maturity assessment and created a transformation roadmap focusing on the customer journey and internal processes.
cases.c2r1: Digital transformation plan with clear prioritisation
cases.c2r2: Digitised customer journey with increased satisfaction
cases.c2r3: Streamlined processes that freed up resources
cases.c2r4: New digital competence in the organisation
cases.c3Title: Leadership coaching for a new CEO
cases.c3Challenge: A newly appointed CEO needed to quickly establish themselves, build trust and navigate multiple parallel change initiatives.
cases.c3Approach: Through individual coaching, we worked on leadership vision, change management and communication with key stakeholders.
cases.c3r1: Clear leadership vision anchored in the organisation
cases.c3r3: Increased trust from board and management team
cases.c3r4: Personal growth and increased leadership courage
cases.ctaDesc: Every success story begins with a conversation.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let us talk
contact.desc: Have questions or want to discuss how we can help your business? Get in touch — we always respond personally.
contact.thankYouDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible, normally within 1–2 business days.

contact.preferCallDesc: Book a free call directly and let us discuss your needs and opportunities.

booking.desc: Take the first step. Fill in the form below and we will get back to you to find a time. The call is free and takes about 30 minutes.
booking.thankYouDesc: We will get back to you within 24 hours with a confirmed time.

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Your privacy is important to us. Here we describe how we collect, use and protect your personal data.
privacy.s1Content: Blomsnes Development based in Sweden is the data controller for the processing of your personal data in connection with the use of this website and our services.
privacy.s2Content: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide to us through our contact and booking forms. This data may include name, email address, phone number, company name as well as messages and other information you provide in forms.
privacy.s3Content: We use your personal data to respond to your enquiries, book calls with you, provide our services and communicate with you regarding ongoing or planned engagements. We never share your personal data with third parties without your consent, unless required by law.
privacy.s4Content: The processing of your personal data is based on your consent and our legitimate interest in responding to enquiries and providing services you have requested.
privacy.s5Content: We store your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or manipulation.
privacy.s6Content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to request access to, rectification and erasure of your personal data. You also have the right to object to processing, request restriction of processing and the right to data portability. You may withdraw your consent at any time.
privacy.s7Content: This website may use cookies to improve your experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device. You can change your cookie settings in your browser at any time.
privacy.s8Content: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy. For material changes, we will inform you on our website. Last updated: January 2025.
privacy.s9Content: Have questions about our handling of personal data? Contact us at kontakt@blomsnesdevelopment.se. You also have the right to file a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY).
